title: Committee
description: An authorized campaign committee — the filer that submits disclosure statements and receives contributions on behalf of a candidate. Reconciled from the 'COMMITTEE' / 'RECIPID' fields carried across the CFB Campaign Contributions (rjkp-yttg), Expenditures (qxzj-vkn2), and Intermediaries (tcwb-nry3) datasets. CFB does not publish a standalone committee registry dataset; this entity is derived from the transaction records and the registered-political-committees list on nyccfb.info.
